description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test Python that runs on push, pull request, and merge group events. The workflow has three jobs: testpython, update_durations, and pass. The testpython job runs on ubuntu-22.04 with a matrix strategy for Python 3.8 and 3.11 across 6 groups. It checks out the code, sets up Python, installs MPI, and runs tests with pytest and coverage. The update_durations job combines test durations from the testpython job. The pass job depends on the testpython and update_durations jobs and always succeeds.
